string.name: Text_Page
string.value:
Communication between pages:
1. Communication between different pages requires the use of the same EventEmitter object
2. When sending communication events between different pages, be sure to listen for the emitter.on event before sending it. mit, otherwise it cannot be received

string.name: State_Sting11

string.name: Message_Listen
string.value: Monitor the same event multiple times to see if it is processed in the order of events in the queue. After testing, it was found that emitter.on listens to the same event multiple times. According to the order of addition, each listen will be executed. Modifying callback data in the listen will not change the data in other listeners. It is not allowed to send events with the same name again in the listener
